title: Building Your First Shelter
description: Learn to build a safe place to survive the night

content.text:
Building a Shelter

When night falls, hostile mobs spawn. A shelter protects you from these dangers.

Why Build a Shelter:

  • Zombies, skeletons, and creepers spawn at night
  • You need a safe place to sleep
  • Storage for your items
  • A base for future expansion

Simple Shelter Design:

  • Build walls at least 2 blocks high
  • Add a roof to prevent mobs from entering
  • Include a door for easy access
  • Place torches inside for light

Building Tips:

  • Collect plenty of materials before nightfall
  • Build near your spawn point
  • Keep it simple at first
  • You can expand later
content.task: Build a small shelter with walls, a roof, a door, and torches before nightfall.
